title: Agromech droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Agromech droids''' were the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]], agrarian version of [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]]. [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] produced several types of agromech in the years leading up to the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], including the [[R2-AG agromech droid|R2-AG]] and [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4-series]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of the popular [[R-series/Legends|R-series]] of astromech droids.
